scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: 6 read streams (lists, campaigns, list_contacts plus the wave2 3-stream base; list_tags and campaign_summary_reports new this pass, the latter a fan_out stream over every campaign id) and 13 write actions covering list/contact/tag/custom-field lifecycle plus automation enrollment. This IS the full documented v1.6 surface — v1.6 is EmailOctopus's legacy API version (v2 exists and is recommended for new integrations per the docs banner, but this connector targets v1.6 per its existing base_url/spec, and Pass B stays within that version rather than silently migrating to a different API version). Excluded: the per-recipient campaign engagement-detail reports (bounced/clicked/complained/opened/sent/unsubscribed/not-clicked/not-opened contact lists — a large per-recipient analytics breakdown distinct from the aggregate summary report), the bulk multi-contact update endpoint, and single-object detail-by-id endpoints that duplicate an already-covered list stream's record shape.

excluded.reason: single-list detail; identical record shape to the lists list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-contact detail; identical record shape to the list_contacts list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
the list_contacts stream already reads every contact regardless of status; this is a status-filtered view of the same underlying record set, not a distinct resource shape
the list_contacts stream already reads every contact regardless of status; this is a status-filtered view of the same underlying record set, not a distinct resource shape
the list_contacts stream already reads every contact regardless of tag; this is a tag-filtered view of the same underlying record set, not a distinct resource shape

bulk multi-contact update over an array of up to 100 contact objects in one call; update_list_contact already covers the per-record mutation shape this dialect expresses, the batch form is narrower breadth-vs-cost triage this pass
single-campaign detail; identical record shape to the campaigns list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
per-link click-count breakdown for one campaign; a secondary analytics cut beyond the aggregate summary report, breadth-vs-cost triage this pass
per-recipient bounced-contact list for one campaign; a large per-recipient analytics breakdown distinct from the aggregate summary report already covered, breadth-vs-cost triage this pass
per-recipient clicked-contact list for one campaign; part of the excluded per-recipient engagement-detail matrix
per-recipient complained-contact list for one campaign; part of the excluded per-recipient engagement-detail matrix
per-recipient opened-contact list for one campaign; part of the excluded per-recipient engagement-detail matrix
per-recipient sent-contact list for one campaign; part of the excluded per-recipient engagement-detail matrix
per-recipient unsubscribed-contact list for one campaign; part of the excluded per-recipient engagement-detail matrix
per-recipient not-clicked-contact list for one campaign; part of the excluded per-recipient engagement-detail matrix
per-recipient not-opened-contact list for one campaign; part of the excluded per-recipient engagement-detail matrix
